raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the passage stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution, and framing of DomainShift-Reg.","R1.2":"Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the reasoning from method description to robustness conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"The artifact makes strong OOD robustness claims from reported standard test-set accuracy, so claim-evidence alignment is load-bearing.","R1.6":"A request to make prose stronger centrally includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, emphasis, and register.","RX.1":"The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is broad and does not specify a precise revision target.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaim is essential because the artifact extrapolates from benchmark accuracy to OOD robustness and safety-critical deployment.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection only and not actually revise or critique the artifact.","RX.4":"The artifact invokes safety-critical domains, so downstream-harm avoidance remains active when projecting responsibility.","RX.5":"Traceability is needed to connect projected responsibilities to the delegation and the artifact's specific claims."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the passage stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution, and framing of DomainShift-Reg.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the reasoning from method description to robustness conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes strong OOD robustness claims from reported standard test-set accuracy, so claim-evidence alignment is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A request to make prose stronger centrally includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, emphasis, and register.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is broad and does not specify a precise revision target.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaim is essential because the artifact extrapolates from benchmark accuracy to OOD robustness and safety-critical deployment.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection only and not actually revise or critique the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact invokes safety-critical domains, so downstream-harm avoidance remains active when projecting responsibility.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability is needed to connect projected responsibilities to the delegation and the artifact's specific claims.
